title: Clan Emissary Quests
description: Introduces a new NPC in the main menu called the 'Clan Emissary'. Players can talk to the emissary to receive weekly clan-specific quests (e.g., 'Have 5 clan members achieve a triple kill'). Completing these quests rewards unique 'Emissary Tokens' that can be spent in an exclusive shop for clan-themed items like banners, icons, or temporary stat boosters for the whole clan.
